# Shiftora

> Shiftora builds custom enterprise AI systems, software, and intelligent automations that make large enterprises AI-native. Senior-led engineering, delivered to production in weeks, not quarters. Operating from Dubai and Mumbai, serving enterprises worldwide.

Shiftora is a B2B custom AI engineering firm. We audit how work moves through an organization, rebuild core workflows as production AI systems, and operate them as a long-term partner. Capabilities span predictive lead scoring and sales intelligence, custom CRMs and high-volume outbound, LLM applications (RAG and agents), predictive forecasting and ML, computer vision, document automation, and full-platform rebuilds.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.shiftora.ai/): Positioning, selected (anonymized) client engagements, how we work, and contact.
- [Careers](https://www.shiftora.ai/careers): Open engineering roles in Mumbai and Dubai.
- [Blog](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog): Articles on building AI-native enterprises, custom AI systems, and intelligent automation.

- [What does it actually mean for an enterprise to become AI-native?](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/what-is-an-ai-native-enterprise)
- [How long does it really take to ship a custom enterprise AI system?](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/how-long-to-ship-a-custom-enterprise-ai-system)
- [What does a custom enterprise AI engagement cost, and why there is no price list?](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/what-does-a-custom-enterprise-ai-engagement-cost)
- [Custom AI versus off-the-shelf tools: when is a tailored build the right call?](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/custom-ai-vs-off-the-shelf-tools)
- [How a predictive CRM lets a sales team operate like one several times its size](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/predictive-crm-sales-team-operating-larger)
- [How do you rebuild a core platform with AI without breaking what already works?](https://www.shiftora.ai/blog/rebuilding-a-core-platform-without-breaking-it)
